title: Savory Greek Seafood Saganaki
description: A festive Greek dish featuring seafood stock and a cheese pull, made Whole30-friendly by using compliant ingredients, served in a kadhai vessel and formed as a saganaki.

ingredients.name: compliant cheese substitute
ingredients.notes: such as cashew cheese or vegan feta

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large kadhai vessel over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the chopped onion and cook for 2 minutes until translucent.
Add the shrimp, mussels, and clams, and cook for 2 minutes until they start to open.
Pour in the seafood stock and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the seafood cook for 5 minutes until the shells are open and the shrimp are pink.
Stir in the compliant cheese substitute until melted and well combined.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Serve the saganaki hot, straight from the kadhai vessel.
